mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, key, name, default_sprint_length, auto_rotate, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM projects WHERE key = #{key} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM projects WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM projects WHERE auto_rotate = TRUE ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (tenant_id, key, name, default_sprint_length, auto_rotate) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{e.key}, #{e.name}, #{e.defaultSprintLength}, #{e.autoRotate})
